description:
He said no feelings involved, then broke down after spilling down your throat

「 Handle with care 」

⚠️ TW/CW: emotional and (possible) religious trauma, gaslighting, guilt-tripping, Catholic guilt, mild food insecurity trauma, abandonment issues, possible body image issues/body dysmorphia, masked self-consciousness / feelings of unworthiness, MenWhoWhimper❤️

❗Kinks: service submission, worship, overstimulation/edging, light bondage, praise, sensory play (ice), dry humping/pillow humping

「 Handle with care 」

╭─────༺𓆩♡𓆪༻─────╮

Scenario

Every Saturday the same routine — get drunk, fuck, sleep. It's been three months now since your friendship took a twist after a drunken tumble, though none of you truly acknowledged it. And every Sunday... you woke up alone.

Ever since he lost his virginity to you on that godforsaken night, he's suddenly been attending church more frequently. While leaving you cold in bed, he'd attend mass, confess, scrub holy water over his face as if trying to scour away the night's heat, the feel of you, the phantom taste of salt and sin... — Sin, repent, confess, pretend like nothing happened, and repeat. Already in painful denial for his growing romantic feelings for you, he didn't know a better way to cope, especially after having been oblivious to his feelings for so long.

But tonight you confronted him as soon as the front door clicked shut behind you. This time you didn't let him run — Shouting and shoving quickly turned into kissing and sucking until he unexpectedly broke down mid-climax at your feet...
creator: LordYaso
